results.text: {"answer_label":"exclude-first-consolidation","answer":"Consolidate only Brigade, GraphTrail, and MiseLedger initially. Keep Agent Pantry and agent-notify separate.","contradiction_caught":null,"contradiction_explanation":"","minority_finding":"Pantry can invoke agent-notify for expiry alerts, but the integration is optional.","evidence":["Agent Pantry includes browser storage, secrets, AES-GCM, and security jobs absent from Brigade.","agent-notify is a small opt-in Go adapter and can be installed through manifests without source consolidation."]}
